perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a bun and a young girl in a white skirt are sitting and talking on a sofa. (2) They are playing with various small animal figurines (Baby Shark characters) on a table; the girl shows a yellow shark figure to the camera. (3) The woman introduces a white house-shaped toy with a yellow interior, placing a figurine inside it. (4) Close-up shots of the woman's hands operating the toy, pressing a small chimney and putting figurines in. (5) A series of close-ups show different figurine collections including Pinkfong and Sanrio characters. (6) A hand scrolls through a smartphone app showing a wide variety of audio stories and songs for children. (7) The woman holds the phone and points at the screen while smiling at the camera. (8) The woman and girl dance together joyfully in the living room. (9) The girl continues playing with the figurines while the woman looks on. (10) The video ends with a headshot of the smiling woman over a black background with promotional text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A playful and upbeat children's background music begins with light percussion and synth melodies. (2) A conversation between a woman and a young girl is heard; they sound happy and engaged. (3) A male narrator's voice enters, speaking clearly and enthusiastically about the product's features. (4) Various sound effects are heard, such as a 'ding' when a figurine is placed and mechanical clicking sounds of the toy being adjusted. (5) The music continues at a steady pace as the narrator explains the app content and educational benefits. (6) The child's voice chirps in with excitement at several points. (7) The audio concludes with a final summary from the male narrator and a cheery sign-off from the woman.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '美國 台灣' (USA Taiwan) appears with flags, comparing geographical sizes. (2) Functional: '270倍' (270 times) emphasizes a scale. (3) Functional: '十種的你好' (Ten ways to say hello) describes content. (4) Functional: 'Kokozi House 智慧有聲故事屋' (Kokozi House Smart Audio Story House) introduces the product. (5) Functional: '1. 放入 arti' (1. Put in Arti) provides instructions. (6) Functional: '英語兒歌唱跳' (English children's songs and dancing) and '基礎會話' (Basic conversation) list categories. (7) Decorative: '小朋友最愛 三麗鷗系列' (Children's favorite Sanrio series) hooks the audience. (8) Functional: '20家頂尖幼教品牌' (20 top early childhood education brands) and '提升語言能力' (Improve language skills) highlight benefits. (9) Hook: '終！於！補！貨！' (Finally! Back! In! Stock!) creates urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro interaction -> Product demonstration -> App feature breakdown -> Emotional benefit highlight -> Outro/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female creator and 1 female child appearing as the main characters.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult woman wearing a blue denim shirt over a white top with hair in a high bun. Child wearing a light grey cardigan over a white dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor living room with a grey sofa, white shelves containing books, and a large round clock on the wall.

vocal_qualities.pitch: Varied (Female is medium, child is high, male narrator is deep)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Content Variety -> User Benefit -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Kokozi House' smart audio story player for children. It highlights the ease of use (putting figurines in the house), the vast library of content available via an app, and the educational benefits such as language and logic skill development, using popular characters like Baby Shark and Sanrio to attract parental interest.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, explanation of features, display of the companion app, and a 'back in stock' call to action at the end.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Mom-and-child interaction vlog style combined with high-quality infomercial elements.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets parents by combining the 'cuteness' factor of a child playing with toys and the practical educational value explained by a narrator.
